creator: masaki@club.kyutech.ac.jp
text:
I just submitted my first port, and received an automatic email that says
 the report is viewable here at any time:
 
 http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=162223
 
 However, trying to access the above link results in: "No PRs Matched
 Query". Is there a delay before the web site is updated for the first PR,
 or was there any mistake in my PR?
 
 -- 
 Masaki TAGAWA <masaki@club.kyutech.ac.jp>
